audio.script: Hello! My name is Mia. On Saturday morning, I go to the market with my mum. The market is in the town centre, next to the old church. We always buy fresh fruit and vegetables there. My mum buys apples, bananas and tomatoes. I love the apples because they are very sweet. The market opens at eight o'clock and closes at one o'clock. My favourite shop sells cheese and fresh bread. After shopping, we have a hot chocolate in a small café. I really like Saturday mornings!

tasks.transcript: Hello! My name is Mia. On Saturday morning, I go to the market with my mum. The market is in the town centre, next to the old church. We always buy fresh fruit and vegetables there. My mum buys apples, bananas and tomatoes. I love the apples because they are very sweet. The market opens at eight o'clock and closes at one o'clock. My favourite shop sells cheese and fresh bread. After shopping, we have a hot chocolate in a small café. I really like Saturday mornings!

prompt.text: When does Mia go to the market?

items.hintDe: Achte auf den Wochentag und die Tageszeit.
items.explainDe: Mia sagt „On Saturday morning … I go to the market“.

cue.quote: On Saturday morning, I go to the market with my mum.

items.trickDe: Der erste Satz sagt dir oft, worum es geht.

distractorMeta.whyDe: Klingt fast wie Saturday — aber es ist ein anderer Tag.
Ein Tag kommt vor, aber evening hörst du nicht.
afternoon sagt Mia nie — sie spricht vom Morgen.

prompt.text: True or false? The market is next to the old church.

items.explainDe: „The market is in the town centre, next to the old church.“

cue.quote: The market is in the town centre, next to the old church.

items.trickDe: Bei Orts-Fragen: warte auf next to, in, at.

distractorMeta.whyDe: Du hörst church im Text — genau darum musst du prüfen, WO.

cue.quote: The market opens at eight o'clock

items.trickDe: Zahlen kommen oft doppelt: opens UND closes. Höre genau, welche.

prompt.text: Match each place to what you can get there.

items.hintDe: Was verkauft der Lieblingsladen? Was trinkt Mia im Café?
items.explainDe: Der Lieblingsladen verkauft Käse und Brot; im Café gibt es eine heiße Schokolade.

cue.quote: My favourite shop sells cheese and fresh bread.

items.trickDe: Verbinde Ort und Sache erst NACH dem zweiten Hören.

prompt.text: What does Mia drink after shopping?

items.explainDe: „… we have a hot chocolate in a small café.“

cue.quote: we have a hot chocolate in a small café

items.trickDe: Nach After shopping kommt, was danach passiert.
